introSection: Timberline Twister was a Bradley & Kaye kiddie roller coaster previously located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. It was built in 1983.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Timberline Twister opened with the Camp Snoopy area in 1983.

On February 14, 2014, the ride reopened with Peanuts theming.

In 2023, Timberline Twister was closed along with Camp Bus.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 3 across in 2 rows for a total of 18 riders.

fullText:
Timberline Twister was a Bradley & Kaye kiddie roller coaster previously located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. It was built in 1983.

Timberline Twister opened with the Camp Snoopy area in 1983.

On February 14, 2014, the ride reopened with Peanuts theming.

In 2023, Timberline Twister was closed along with Camp Bus.



Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 3 across in 2 rows for a total of 18 riders.
